Issues: Lack of Originality: The style is very simplistic and generic (flat colors, simple outlines), which limits its unique commercial appeal.
Potential for Copyright/Style Misappropriation: Simple character portraits can be easily copied or sold without unique protection.
Low Commercial Appeal: Without a strong, unique artistic style or context, the image has low intrinsic value for mass-market sales.
Print Quality: The line work and color application appear basic, which may detract from high-quality print products.
